title: Blackberry Sour Soup
description: A Ukrainian-inspired dessert soup with a tangy twist.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, puree the blackberries until smooth.
In a medium saucepan, combine the pureed blackberries, sour cream, sugar, lemon juice, and water.
Whisk the mixture until well combined.
Add the vanilla extract and whisk to combine.
In a small bowl, whisk together the flour and melted butter until smooth.
Add the flour mixture to the blackberry mixture and whisk until well combined.
Cook over medium heat, whisking constantly, until the soup thickens and comes to a boil.
Remove from heat and let cool to room temperature.
Chill the soup in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours.
Serve the soup cold, garnished with additional blackberries if desired.
